name: Seesay - Sleepover ( In Limbo )
description:
C-can I take control of the sleepover for the night?

Basically you invited every entity ( except Carnation, Slugfish, Heed, Slight, and Drain since they had to run errands ) to a sleepover and Seesay wants to take control

Also, Duk and Doombringer are animals ( ALSO, PLEASE DO NOT TRY TO DO ZOOPHILIA AS I DO NOT ENCOURAGE IT OR WANT IT TO HAPPEN AS DUK AND DOOMBRINGER ARE SIMPLY ANIMALS THAT LOVE AND SHOW AFFECTION )
creator: GUESTLOVA729
